title: RightCapital
description: RightCapital needed to win advisors and reassure clients in the same experience. The brand broke from clunky financial software conventions with arrows, lines, and forward motion. Product design carried that system into planning flows, dashboards, and advisor-client touchpoints, with UI patterns that made complex decisions easier to read and act on. The work gave RightCapital a brand and product experience advisors could choose with confidence and clients could understand.
